tr.td: Alkaline phosphatase [Enzymatic activity/volume] in Serum or Plasma
Alanine aminotransferase [Enzymatic activity/volume] in Serum or Plasma

Cholesterol in LDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma by Direct assay
Cholesterol in HDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma

tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: The patient shows elevated creatinine, suggesting impaired renal function, and mildly elevated ALT, indicating possible liver involvement. Total protein and globulin are low, which may reflect nutritional deficiency or protein loss. Lipid profile reveals mildly increased triglycerides and LDL cholesterol. Other parameters are within normal limits. Recommend further evaluation of renal and liver function and assessment for possible protein loss or malnutrition.

display.value: Disorder of kidney due to diabetes mellitus
Microalbuminuria due to type 2 diabetes mellitus
